examples: The foliage was soft and feathery.
It was so thick, and the foliage so dense, that it was quite fatiguing to proceed.
Presently there came a quivering glow that vaguely revealed the foliage for a moment and then vanished.
An elephant suddenly surged out of the foliage about 20m away, staring directly at us.
Having demolished the cake, the bear turns and slips back into the thick foliage.
